---
title: "Quasi-Monte Carlo Software Packages"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

This page is intended to be a community-maintained resource for software related to quasi-Monte Carlo methods. Contributions are welcome.  

Please submit a pull request targeting the `develop` branch with corrections or additions to the [`qmc-software.yml`](data/qmc-software.yml) data file.

If you prefer not to use GitHub pull requests, you may instead email updates to [Fred Hickernell](mailto:hickernell@illinoistech.edu).


<style>
.qmc-software-table {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.qmc-software-table td {
  vertical-align: top;
}

.software-desc,
.software-related {
  font-size: 0.9em;
  color: #555;
}

.status-nowrap {
  white-space: normal;
}

.qmc-software-table thead th {
  background-color: #222;
  color: white;
}

</style>


```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import runpy

helper_namespace = runpy.run_path("utilities/qmc_software_table.py")

helper_namespace["render_qmc_software_table"](
    data_path="data/qmc-software.yml",
    mode="web",
)
```
